title: OptraSight BatchOne integration catalog
description: Public-safe connector metadata for the BatchOne threat-intel workstation. This catalog lists only metadata needed by the BatchOne release line.

integrations.name: urlscan.io
integrations.purpose: Optional URL context lookup for source review when an operator configures their own urlscan.io key.

active_batchone_surfaces: Intel Inbox source catalog and finding review
security_notes: API keys are stored in the separate secret database, not in this catalog.
This file is metadata only and must not include customer-specific credentials, workspace names, or private endpoints.
